title: Wormhole - REKT
relevance_summary: Signature manipulation and bridge exploit leading to large ETH theft

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls complete_wrapped() with a SignatureSet created in a previous transaction.
prevention.trigger: complete_wrapped() -> SignatureSet created in a previous transaction

red_flags: SignatureSet created in a previous transaction
Verification discrepancy between solana_program::sysvar::instructions and solana_program
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls complete_wrapped() with a SignatureSet created in a previous transaction.
summary: The Wormhole bridge was exploited through a signature manipulation attack, allowing the hacker to mint 120k whETH on Solana and subsequently withdraw 93,750 ETH. A $10M bug bounty was offered but not claimed, leaving the stolen funds in the hacker's wallet.
